CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28393, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY OF BERKELEY, RENT STABILIZATION BOARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAULOS, NICK $2,772.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,772.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 28393 ON 09/06/2007. NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CASES #28393 (820221)$2772. PRINCIPAL AND #28392 (820219) $5000.PRINCIPAL PER CCP116.220 ARE CONSOLIDATED WITH LEAD CASE #28390 (820220)$2772.PRINCIPLE PLUS $137.COSTS. TOTAL JUDGMENT FOR ALL 3 CASES IS $10,681.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
